mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_sequence ( biz_code, current_value, update_time ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{currentValue}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_value = GREATEST(current_value, VALUES(current_value)), update_time = NOW()

INSERT INTO system_sequence (biz_code, current_value, version, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, 1, 0, NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_value = current_value + 1, update_time = NOW()
